CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
